Michael Torres
michael.torres@email.com | (650) 555-0234 | San Francisco, CA | linkedin.com/in/michaeltorres

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Platform engineering leader with 8 years of experience building and scaling distributed data infrastructure. Track record of designing systems that process billions of events daily with 99.99% uptime. Combines deep technical expertise with cross-functional leadership to deliver high-impact platform capabilities.

EXPERIENCE

Principal Platform Engineer — StreamCore Inc.
Jan 2022 - Present
- Architected next-generation event streaming platform processing 15B+ events/day with sub-100ms p99 latency
- Led platform reliability initiative achieving 99.99% uptime across 30+ microservices, saving $2M annually in SLA penalties
- Designed and implemented multi-region active-active deployment strategy, reducing disaster recovery time from 4 hours to 8 minutes
- Drove adoption of infrastructure-as-code (Terraform) across 5 engineering teams, cutting provisioning time by 85%
- Built self-service internal developer platform reducing new service onboarding from 2 weeks to 3 hours

Senior Platform Engineer — DataVault Corp.
Mar 2019 - Dec 2021
- Owned and operated Kafka-based data ingestion pipeline processing 500M+ messages/day with zero data loss
- Implemented comprehensive observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, Jaeger) reducing mean time to detection by 60%
- Migrated 200+ services from EC2 to Kubernetes, achieving 40% infrastructure cost reduction
- Designed circuit breaker and rate limiting patterns adopted as company-wide standards
- Mentored 6 engineers and led weekly architecture review sessions

Software Engineer — QuickByte Technologies
Jul 2016 - Feb 2019
- Built distributed caching layer using Redis cluster supporting 100K+ concurrent connections
- Developed gRPC-based service communication framework used by 15+ internal services
- Implemented automated canary deployment pipeline, reducing failed deployments by 75%
- Contributed to open-source Kubernetes operator for stateful workload management (500+ GitHub stars)

SKILLS
Go, Python, Rust, Kafka, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS (ECS, EKS, Lambda, DynamoDB, Kinesis), Terraform, PostgreSQL, Redis, gRPC, Protocol Buffers, Prometheus, Grafana, Istio, CI/CD, Infrastructure-as-Code, Distributed Systems Design

EDUCATION
M.S. Computer Science — Stanford University (2016)
B.S. Computer Science — UC Berkeley (2014)

CERTIFICATIONS
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Professional
- Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
- Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect
